resources.string: Cipher uses Accessibility Service to see and interact with your apps. This allows voice-controlled app navigation, screen reading, and UI interaction.
Cipher intercepts notifications to read important ones aloud and act on them.
Runs entirely on your phone. No cloud. No compromise.
Cipher needs these to work properly
Cipher uses Accessibility Service to read your screen, tap buttons, and navigate apps by voice. This data never leaves your phone.
Shizuku gives Cipher elevated system access for shell commands, system settings, and screenshots. Optional — Cipher works without it.
Say \"Hey Cipher\" to test your wake word
Optional — for cloud fallback and custom wake words
Voice commands • App control • Screen reading • SMS & calls • System settings • Shell access
